statement.summary: Bulk CRISPR, scCRISPR, scRNA-seq, ATAC-seq, CUT&RUN data

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Manuscript dated 2026-04-25 (future date from training cutoff) with multi-modal omics data integration. Status is preprint/provisional—biological datasets require experimental validation and reproducibility assessment not yet completed. The integration of bulk and single-cell CRISPR with chromatin/transcriptomics data represents methodologically sound but pre-consensus work.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 生物学的信号は細胞を積分する時、全体的な遺伝子の位相へ収束する。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 複数のオミクス層が細胞の中心へ放射状に収束し、隠された遺伝的協奏を編む。
